blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,036 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tuesday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
